texto: When the sun goes down, melting away his caresses into the sky which consonants with the ocean, lively colors are scattered through the deep pale depth during some short sensuous instants. Later, as by art of magic, light is consumed into the infinite horizon giving space to the poked voidness and its full-cristal-covered vastness. Then, to mystify the night, a marvelous and alluring sentinel rests next to us through the vivid night, just until the next prismatic fest arrives with its celebrating aperture.
explicacao: Citação de Jose A. Arvide sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “When the sun goes down, melting away his caresses into the sky which consonants with the ocean, l…” articula vida, beauty, day em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
